article_id: Article 1. Establishment of the Republic of Namibia and Identification of Its Territory
text_snippet: 1. The Republic of Namibia is hereby established as a sovereign, secular, democratic and unitary State founded upon the principles of democracy, the rule of law and justice for all. 2. All power shall

article_id: Article 10. Equality and Freedom from Discrimination
text_snippet: 1. All persons shall be equal before the law. 2. No persons may be discriminated against on the grounds of sex, race, colour, ethnic origin, religion, creed or social or economic status.
